summary: Decent distant‑audience recording of an uneven show that finds its stride in a strong second set and a memorable I Fought the Law encore.
review: The tape is a far‑field audience capture – not crystal clear but mixed well enough, though it sounds a bit dusty. Musically the first set wanders with Garcia sounding half‑present, while the second set gels and delivers an energetic post‑space ballad and a fun I Fought the Law encore.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is mixed (some strong moments, many uneven spots) and recording is only fair due to distant audience source; combined rating lands in the low‑mid range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Distant AUD capture with decent mix but noticeable tape hiss/dustiness and limited clarity compared to soundboard sources.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set feels uneven and loosely driven, second set picks up momentum and delivers stronger performances, ending with a lively encore.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Early in the show Garcia sounds half‑present, but he regains his classic tone and energy in the second set.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned only in context of missing a rehearsal call; no performance comment.
